nasb.text: So Moses did just as the Lord commanded him. When the congregation was assembled at the doorway of the tent of meeting,

esv.text: And Moses did as the Lord commanded him, and the congregation was assembled at the entrance of the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 於是摩西照著耶和華命令他的去行，會眾就聚集到會幕門口那裡。

ccb.text: 摩西按照耶和华的指示行事，会众都聚集在会幕门前。
